description_long: This object is a modern ASUS computer monitor with a slim, ultra-thin profile and a large, flat rectangular display. The front features a nearly edge-to-edge screen with a minimal bezel, and the display is supported by a distinctive circular metallic stand that provides stability and a contemporary look. The bezel is thin and dark, with a subtle metallic strip along the bottom edge, adding a touch of elegance. The rear of the monitor is glossy black with the ASUS logo prominently displayed in the center, and the stand attaches at the lower back. No physical buttons or ports are visible from any angle, suggesting a clean and minimalist design. The overall appearance is sleek and professional, suitable for both office and home environments.
description: A slim, modern ASUS computer monitor with a nearly bezel-less display and a circular metallic stand, featuring a glossy black rear and minimalist design.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the monitor's ultra-thin screen and the circular metallic stand.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the large display area, thin bezel, and ASUS logo on a light background.
description_view_2: Another side profile, mirroring view 0, emphasizing the monitor's slimness and stand shape.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a glossy black surface with the ASUS logo and the attachment point of the circular stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is extremely thin, especially on the top and sides, with a slightly thicker metallic strip at the bottom. It has a matte black finish with sharp corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular, open ring made of metallic material, attached centrally to the lower back of the monitor. It is a pedestal type with a modern, minimalist design and no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor in any view.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS logo is visible on the front display area, positioned in the upper right corner, and also on the rear panel, centered and in a lighter shade for contrast.
